name: AutoPaperReader Wiki

research_lines.name: Parallel Decoding with Diffusion Models
research_lines.owner_note: Track diffusion language model and speculative decoding updates.

research_lines.name: Efficient Attention Kernels
research_lines.owner_note: Review new GPU kernel and serving papers.

Efficient Attention Kernels.note: Review new GPU kernel and serving papers.

Parallel Decoding with Diffusion Models.note: Track diffusion language model and speculative decoding updates.

LLM Systems.description: Systems-oriented papers about serving, inference, kernels, memory, and scalability for language models.

Efficient Attention Kernels.description: Papers about exact or approximate attention kernels, GPU execution, and serving-time attention engines.

Parallel Decoding with Diffusion Models.description: Papers that use diffusion-style or speculative mechanisms for parallel token generation.

Attention Kernels.description: Attention implementation, scheduling, and memory-layout techniques used by LLM inference systems.

Parallel Decoding.description: Methods that generate or verify multiple tokens per step rather than strictly left-to-right one-token decoding.

Speculative Decoding.description: Draft-and-verify decoding methods that preserve target-model output distribution while improving latency.

FlashAttention.description: IO-aware exact attention kernel family that reduces HBM traffic with tiling and online softmax.

Speculative Decoding.description: Use a draft process and acceptance rule to accelerate autoregressive generation.

unread.description: Known paper that has not been opened or routed into a reading pass yet.

skimmed.description: Paper has received a quick pass; keep it visible for deeper reading or triage.

reading.description: Currently being read, annotated, reproduced, or used for an active synthesis task.

read.description: Main report is stable enough to use as reference material.

archived.description: Kept for provenance but no longer active in current queues or weekly review.

inbox.description: Research workflow entry state for candidate papers that need triage.

triaged.description: Research candidate has been classified and assigned a likely next action.

implemented.description: Core idea or code path has been implemented, reproduced, or mapped to local code.

cited.description: Paper has been used in a writeup, roadmap, experiment note, or related synthesis.

skim.description: Fast pass for scope, claims, and whether the paper belongs in this library.

normal_read.description: Standard reading pass focused on method, experiments, and limitations.

deep_read.description: Detailed pass including equations, assumptions, ablations, and cross-paper comparison.

code_checked.description: Implementation, repository structure, or reproducibility notes have been checked.

reproduced.description: Key result, benchmark, or implementation behavior has been reproduced locally or in a controlled experiment.

fresh.description: Recently reviewed; no immediate spaced-review action is needed.

due.description: Ready for scheduled review, synthesis, or update against newer related work.

evergreen.description: Stable foundational paper worth keeping in recurring review or teaching sets.

command_recipes.label: Export taxonomy action patch template
command_recipes.command: python3 scripts/export_taxonomy_actions.py docs --format patch --action merge_candidate --output docs/exports/taxonomy-action-patch.csv

command_recipes.label: Export taxonomy registry project tasks
command_recipes.command: python3 scripts/export_taxonomy_registry.py docs --format project --severity high --severity medium --output docs/exports/taxonomy-registry-project.csv

governance_playbooks.label: Taxonomy merge batch
governance_playbooks.description: Review merge candidates, prepare a metadata patch, dry-run it, then refresh quality gates.

governance_playbooks.label: Taxonomy balance review
governance_playbooks.description: Turn overloaded or sparse taxonomy buckets into project tasks before changing labels.

governance_playbooks.label: Weekly action review
governance_playbooks.description: Export the unified queue, assign dynamic task statuses, and run the local quality gate.

governance_playbooks.label: Paper intake batch
governance_playbooks.description: Preview a candidate CSV, merge it into inbox.csv, rebuild, then validate the incoming queue.

governance_playbooks.label: Status workflow rollout
governance_playbooks.description: Preview a downloaded status workflow, write it to taxonomy.json, rebuild, then validate.

governance_playbooks.label: Shared view rollout
governance_playbooks.description: Promote browser-saved queues into repository shared_views and validate the refreshed wiki.

governance_playbooks.label: Release readiness
governance_playbooks.description: Rebuild the wiki, validate strict taxonomy, then run the full quality gate before publishing.

commands: python3 scripts/export_taxonomy_actions.py docs --format patch --action merge_candidate --output docs/exports/taxonomy-action-patch.csv
python3 scripts/export_taxonomy_registry.py docs --format project --severity high --severity medium --output docs/exports/taxonomy-registry-project.csv
